label: Ortur Laser Master 2 Pro S2 (GRBL)
description: Controller rules for Ortur LM2 Pro S2 running GRBL.

quirks: Needs S parameter for laser power
G2/G3 arcs supported in G17 (XY) plane only
No Z axis motion for laser jobs

provenance.author: GitHub Copilot
provenance.source: Ortur LM2 Pro S2 manual, GRBL 1.1f docs
